headline: A Look At Tractor Supply (TSCO) Valuation After Softer Quarterly Results And Sluggish Revenue Growth
summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) is back in focus after softer quarterly results, with flat same-store sales, low gross margins, and sluggish three year revenue growth weighing on sentiment despite what many see as a reasonable valuation. See our latest analysis for Tractor Supply. At a share price of US$44.87, Tractor Supply has seen a 13.33% 1 month share price decline and an 11.73% year to date share price decline. The 5 year total shareholder return of 38.12% shows a much steadier long run outcome...
